title: Sphaeropteris mertensiana
taxonomy: Sphaeropteris mertensiana is classified as a species of fern in the genus Sphaeropteris, under the family Cyathea and the order Cyatheales. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and evolutionary history. Sphaeropteris mertensiana is a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes all ferns. The family Cyathea is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The classification of Sphaeropteris mertensiana is still subject to ongoing research and revisions in the field of plant taxonomy.

The plant's fronds and roots are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
